summary: Comprehensive testing of Invoice Management & Delivery Tracking system. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Dashboard, Invoice Creator, Invoice List, COD Monitor, Orders, Coupons, Seller Settings, and Public Invoice View all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test invoices and coupons created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice Management system fully tested. Key features verified: Dashboard analytics, Invoice CRUD, Coupon management, Seller settings, COD/Online monitors, Order management, Public invoice view, PM Dashboard integration (E-Pharmacy dropdown and Generate Invoice button). Payment flow is MOCKED (no real Razorpay). Auth uses session_token cookie with value 'test_inv_be5f4d593598'.

frontend_pages: /invoice-manager - Dashboard with revenue stats, charts, recent invoices ✅
/invoice-manager/invoices - Invoice list with search, filter, pagination ✅
/invoice-manager/invoices/create - Invoice creator with customer details, line items, GST, discounts, coupons ✅
/invoice-manager/invoices/{id} - Invoice view with payment recording, delivery status update, share link ✅
/invoice-manager/cod-monitor - COD payment monitor with stats and charts ✅
pm_dashboard_integration: E-Pharmacy dropdown with 'Manage Invoice & Delivery' link ✅
Medication modal 'Generate Invoice' button navigates to invoice creator with userId param ✅
Customer details pre-filled from user data ✅
Back to PM Dashboard button in sidebar ✅
